脗聽脗聽Helena Dalli, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Madam President, honourable Members, I am pleased to know that we more or less agree on the need for more resilience of submarine cables and critical infrastructure. Preparedness and resilience will remain at the centre of the Commission's efforts to support Member States. It keeps citizens safe and secure and protects our economy and society against interference. I would like to thank you for the cooperation on this important file, and we need to make sure that our response is fit to address the serious geopolitical challenges of today in order to keep Europeans safe.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽President. 芒聙聯 The debate is closed.

脗聽

12. Rise of energy prices and fighting energy poverty (debate)
Video of the speeches
脗聽

脗聽脗聽President. 芒聙聯 Text item on the agenda is the debate on the Commission statement on the rise of energy prices and fighting energy poverty (2024/2955(RSP).

I will give the floor to Commissioner Simpson, when you're ready, madam.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Kadri Simson, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Madam President, honourable Members, it is an honour for me to address you in my last plenary session as EU Commissioner for Energy.

I remember well introducing the energy prices toolbox back in October 2021. This was a tool designed by the Commission to tackle rapidly rising energy prices. At the time, we had not seen the worst of the price hikes. Then, in February 2022, Russia brutally and unlawfully invaded our neighbour and ally, Ukraine. This caused 芒聙聯 and continues to cause today 芒聙聯 tremendous suffering and injustice for the Ukrainian people. It also drove European energy prices to soar, leaving many citizens unsure about how to afford their energy bills.

But we did not back down. Europe stood united. Under REPowerEU, we managed to reduce energy prices, phase out most of our Russian fossil fuel imports and diversify our supply. We have adopted the legal framework to accelerate the clean energy transition and reformed our energy markets to make them more resilient. In particular, we reformed our electricity market, designed to reduce the impact of volatile fossil fuel costs and promote cheaper, home-grown and reliable renewable energy sources. We also reformed our gas markets and enhanced consumer protection, by example making it easier for consumers to switch between suppliers.

However, we know the challenges are still there. There are many factors still impacting our energy prices with upward pressure. The different measures, in particular the acceleration of renewables deployment and the reform of electricity market design will produce its full effects in the medium term while laying the groundwork for the decarbonisation. But, for now, the immediate task is to increase the supply of clean energy and to minimise using fossil fuels as the most expensive price setting technology. Mario Draghi also makes that clear in his recent report on European competitiveness.

Until we succeed, the fact remains that electricity prices in Europe are higher than in the United States due to higher gas prices. This, in turn, impacts our competitiveness and hurts our economies and societies.

But we should not underestimate our potential and progress. In the first half of 2024, wind and solar for the first time overtook power generation from fossil fuels combined. And this year, the EU is crossing the threshold of 500GW of installed solar and wind capacity. Furthermore, we have launched the European Industrial Alliance on Small Modular Reactors to facilitate and accelerate the development, demonstration and deployment in Europe by the early 2030s. These are very impressive milestones.

Honourable Members, looking at the immediate future, let me assure you that Europe is well prepared for this winter. Our gas storages are full. This will help us to maintain a steady gas supply during the winter.

At its meeting on 17 October, the European Council discussed high and volatile electricity prices in south-eastern Europe in particular, and asked the Commission to come up with solutions. The Commission has maintained contact with Member States since the summer, and just last week our experts visited the ones hardest hit. They had detailed talks about how to ensure that retail and wholesale markets are functioning well, to the benefit of consumers, and how to secure enough cross-border capacity in the EU.

These exchanges help to pinpoint several actions that can improve how retail markets operate, the efficient use of infrastructure and the potential of demand response and peak shaving. All these measures serve as a strong foundation for tangible solutions and fully benefit our internal energy market and our consumers.

Honourable Members, over the past few years, a lot has been done to fight energy poverty, but none of it would have been possible without the European Parliament. This House always made sure that energy poverty stayed a top priority and was well-covered in EU law.

We now have a new legal framework that requires Member States to prioritise investments addressing the underlying causes of energy poverty. Member States need to ensure that a share of their energy savings come from low-income and energy-poor households. They also have a duty to protect vulnerable customers from having their electricity or gas supply cut off.

Another notable initiative is the Social Climate Fund, which was created during this mandate. It will provide at least EUR脗聽86.7脗聽billion to directly support the most vulnerable groups affected by the new emission trading system that applies to fuel combustion in buildings and road transport.

I have also pressed hard Member States to deliver their updated national energy and climate plans, as these remain a cornerstone for analyses and measures on energy poverty. The Commission is now supporting Member States in transposing and implementing the legal framework, as well as preparing their national social climate plans, and also published an updated recommendation on energy poverty in 2023. Most of the legal provisions need to be transposed in 2025/2026, so there is a strong focus on implementation in the political guidelines for the next mandate of the Commission.

More broadly, it is also important to consider the many benefits of the energy transition. More and more consumers are producing and managing their own renewable energy. That gives them more control and choice, and citizens are empowered to become active participants in the energy market.

Honourable Members, the bottom line is that a lot has been done but, of course, there is much more to do. We are really only at the beginning of this journey, and I know that high energy prices and energy poverty will be a top priority for the next Commission mandate. I look forward to this debate.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Andrea Wechsler, im Namen der PPE-Fraktion. 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin, sehr geehrte Frau Kommissarin Simson! Zuallererst m脙露chte ich Ihnen herzlich danken f脙录r die Arbeit f脙录r die B脙录rgerinnen und B脙录rger Europas in den letzten f脙录nf Jahren脗聽芒聙聯 herzlichen Dank! Bei allen Erfolgen, die wir feiern k脙露nnen, bleibt eines ganz klar: Die Energiepreise in Europa haben schon l脙陇ngst einen kritischen Punkt 脙录berschritten, und Europa ist von Energiearmut gepr脙陇gt. Eine massive Schieflage belastet unsere B脙录rgerinnen und B脙录rger und unsere Unternehmer und脗聽deswegen braucht es entschlossenes Handeln脗聽芒聙聯 und zwar sofort脗聽芒聙聯 sowohl auf europ脙陇ischer Ebene als auch in den Mitgliedstaaten. Kurzfristig m脙录ssen die Mitgliedstaaten die Besteuerung und die Netzentgelte anpassen, um kurzfristig sp脙录rbare Entlastungen zu schaffen und die Energiearmut effektiv zu bek脙陇mpfen. Auch energieintensive Industrien wie die Stahl芒聙聭, Aluminium芒聙聭, Zement芒聙聭 und Chemieindustrie brauchen gezielte Unterst脙录tzung, um wettbewerbsf脙陇hig zu bleiben.

Langfristig aber m脙录ssen wir hier in Europa die Grundlagen weiter ausbauen f脙录r eine nachhaltige, sichere und wettbewerbsf脙陇hige Energieversorgung. Daher m脙录ssen wir die bestehende Gesetzgebung vereinfachen und umsetzen und dabei den Green Deal als Grundlage nehmen, aber daneben die Wettbewerbsf脙陇higkeit in den Mittelpunkt unserer Energiepolitik setzen. Europa muss die Energieinfrastruktur ausbauen und dabei ein smartes und europaweit vernetztes System schaffen, das erneuerbare Energien effektiv integrieren kann und die Energiesicherheit gew脙陇hrleisten kann. Europa muss seine Energieversorgung pragmatisch ausbauen und dabei neben Technologieoffenheit auf den schnellen Hochlauf erneuerbarer Energien setzen. Schlie脙聼lich muss Europa die F脙陇higkeit zur Energiespeicherung und Netzflexibilit脙陇t vorantreiben und die B脙录rgerinnen und B脙录rger als Teil der Energietransformation verstehen.

Meine sehr geehrten Damen und Herren, die hohen Energiepreise und die Energiearmut in Europa erfordern eine ambitionierte Energiepolitik 芒聙聯 jetzt! In Verantwortung f脙录r unsere B脙录rgerinnen und B脙录rger m脙录ssen wir ohne Verzug handeln. Wir Parlamentarier stehen bereit.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Mohammed Chahim, namens de S&D-Fractie. 芒聙聯 Voorzitter, koken of stoken? Zo zou ik de titel van het脗聽debat in goed Nederlands willen vertalen. Afgelopen jaar stonden 脙漏脙漏n op de tien Europeanen voor die keuze. De energieprijzen vandaag de dag zijn drie keer zo hoog als drie jaar terug. En helaas is energiearmoede een begrip geworden. En niet alleen de energieprijzen zijn hoger. Ook de boodschappen, een woning, of je die nu koopt of huurt, maar ook een dagje uit: het leven is duurder geworden.

Terwijl het aantal mensen in de energiearmoede de afgelopen jaren meer dan verdubbeld is, groeide het vermogen van de 1脗聽% rijksten. Zij konden meer dan 30脗聽% bijschrijven. Hoe scheef willen we het hebben? Terwijl velen voor de keuze staan tussen koken en stoken, kan deze groep blijven dineren en profiteren, want zij betalen naar verhouding minder belasting dan de rest.

En waarom is die belasting voor de allerrijksten zo lastig bespreekbaar? Waar is de politieke wil? Hoe eerlijk is dit? De stijgende energieprijzen komen niet door groene energie, zoals sommigen hier beweren. Eerder het tegenovergestelde: het komt door fossiele brandstoffen, die dan niet alleen prijsopdrijvend zijn, maar ons ook afhankelijk maken van autocraten. Er is een route naar lagere prijzen. We moeten vol inzetten op investeringen in onze onafhankelijkheid, zelfvoorzienend worden, zelfstandig zijn en de lasten eerlijker verdelen. Mensen helpen hun woning te verduurzamen en zorgen voor goedkoop vervoer van脗聽A, naar脗聽B. Alleen zo zorgen we voor een eerlijke transitie en maken we van energiearmoede een begrip uit het verleden.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Julie Rechagneux, au nom du groupe PfE. 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, la fermeture de la derni脙篓re boulangerie d'un village, des milliers de familles qui renoncent 脙聽 se chauffer parce que la facture est trop lourde, le licenciement massif de 1脗聽200脗聽salari脙漏s des usines Michelin, nouvel 脙漏pisode de la saign脙漏e industrielle qui frappe la France. Ces drames, qui sont la r脙漏alit脙漏 de mon pays en脗聽2024, ont une cause en commun: les r脙篓gles du march脙漏 europ脙漏en de l'脙漏lectricit脙漏.

Depuis脗聽2022, ce m脙漏canisme a fait exploser les prix de l'脙漏nergie, avec des hausses intenables de plus de 50脗聽%.

Par ces r脙篓gles absurdes, la Commission europ脙漏enne prive les nations europ脙漏ennes d'une 脙漏nergie bon march脙漏, condition fondamentale pour redevenir un continent de producteurs et mati脙篓re premi脙篓re essentielle de toutes les r脙漏volutions du XXI谩碌聣脗聽si脙篓cle, qu'elles s'appellent le minage de cryptomonnaie, l'informatique quantique ou l'intelligence artificielle.

Par ces r脙篓gles absurdes, la Commission cause la d脙漏tresse de millions de familles et transforme l'Europe en d脙漏sert industriel. Concr脙篓tement, c'est vous qui cr脙漏ez artificiellement la pr脙漏carit脙漏 脙漏nerg脙漏tique.

Par ces r脙篓gles absurdes, qui s'apparentent 脙聽 un vol institutionnel, la Commission europ脙漏enne confisque 脙聽 la France son avantage historique du nucl脙漏aire, avec la passivit脙漏 ou, pire, la complicit脙漏 des dirigeants fran脙搂ais.

Alors que tout le monde s'accorde 脙聽 dire que ces r脙篓gles sont inadapt脙漏es, y compris le tr脙篓s europ脙漏iste Mario脗聽Draghi, elles continuent invariablement de s'appliquer. Elles continuent de frapper les entreprises, de fragiliser les familles, de paup脙漏riser le continent.

La Commission europ脙漏enne est incapable de se r脙漏former, parce qu'elle est incapable de reconna脙庐tre ses erreurs, quitte 脙聽 sacrifier l'avenir des nations du continent. J'en suis convaincue: ce sont les changements politiques en France qui permettront de sortir de l'impasse. Croyez-moi, ils arriveront beaucoup plus vite que vous ne le pensez.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Beata Szyd脜聜o, w imieniu grupy ECR. 芒聙聯 Pani Przewodnicz脛聟ca! Szanowna Pani Komisarz! Problem wysokich cen energii, braku konkurencyjno脜聸ci gospodarki europejskiej i to, 脜录e zaczynamy mie脛聡 coraz powa脜录niejsze k脜聜opoty, wynika z jednej prostej przyczyny. I t脛聟 przyczyn脛聟 jest Zielony 脜聛ad 芒聙聯 program nieprzemy脜聸lany, niedostosowany, program, kt脙鲁ry przepchni脛聶to tylko i wy脜聜脛聟cznie z pobudek politycznych i ideologicznych. Oczywi脜聸cie zdajemy sobie wszyscy spraw脛聶, 脜录e transformacja musi nast脛聶powa脛聡, ale nie w taki spos脙鲁b. I z tych b脜聜脛聶d脙鲁w trzeba wyci脛聟gn脛聟脛聡 wnioski.

Ludzi powinno by脛聡 sta脛聡 na ogrzewanie, na zap脜聜acenie rachunk脙鲁w. Przedsi脛聶biorcy powinni mie脛聡 szans脛聶 na to, 脜录eby m脙鲁c prowadzi脛聡 produkcj脛聶 tutaj, w Europie. To jest w interesie nas wszystkich, to jest w interesie Unii Europejskiej. Tymczasem doprowadzono do tego, 脜录e dzisiaj ludzie p脜聜ac脛聟 rachunki za pr脛聟d i p脜聜acz脛聟; 脜录e przedsi脛聶biorcy rw脛聟 w脜聜osy z g脜聜owy, zwalniaj脛聟 ludzi i musz脛聟 zamyka脛聡 swoje firmy. Dlatego w nast脛聶pnej kadencji Komisji Europejskiej trzeba wyci脛聟gn脛聟脛聡 wnioski i doprowadzi脛聡 do tego, 脜录eby wreszcie przystosowa脛聡 programy Komisji do rzeczywistych mo脜录liwo脜聸ci i potrzeb Europejczyk脙鲁w.

脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Christophe Grudler, au nom du groupe Renew. 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, 4脗聽166: c'est le nombre d'heures durant lesquelles les prix de l'脙漏lectricit脙漏 ont 脙漏t脙漏 n脙漏gatifs sur le march脙漏 europ脙漏en cette ann脙漏e. Un march脙漏 qui fonctionne, n'en d脙漏plaise 脙聽 l'extr脙陋me droite. Des prix n脙漏gatifs durant plus de trois mois cette ann脙漏e. Pourtant, les factures des m脙漏nages et des entreprises restent scandaleusement 脙漏lev脙漏es.

Pourquoi cette incoh脙漏rence? Parce que notre r脙漏seau 脙漏nerg脙漏tique n'est pas assez r脙漏silient face aux fluctuations de la demande; ce n'est ni aux citoyens, ni aux PME d'en payer le prix.

Nous devons agir sur trois points: premi脙篓rement, acc脙漏l脙漏rer le d脙漏ploiement des infrastructures de transport, de distribution et de stockage, pour 脙漏quilibrer l'offre et la demande dans toute l'Europe; deuxi脙篓mement, mettre en place une tarification juste pour toutes les 脙漏nergies propres, en assurant un acc脙篓s 脙漏quitable au r脙漏seau pour le nucl脙漏aire et les renouvelables; enfin, donner la priorit脙漏 脙聽 l'脙漏nergie produite en Europe, pour garantir une 脙漏nergie stable, abordable et accessible 脙聽 tous.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Sara Matthieu, namens de Verts/ALE-Fractie. 芒聙聯 Voorzitter, 脙漏脙漏n op de tien Europeanen kan zijn woning deze winter niet verwarmen. En het zijn de mensen die wonen in koude en tochtige huizen die het meest het slachtoffer zijn van die hoge energieprijzen. Europa moet de strijd tegen die energiearmoede dringend opschroeven. En we moeten dat doen door mensen te helpen hun huizen te renoveren en door over te schakelen op hernieuwbare energie, want de goedkoopste energie is de energie die je niet gebruikt.

We moeten zorgen dat mensen het beter krijgen dankzij Europees beleid. Het Sociaal Klimaatfonds moet mensen financieel ondersteunen om hun woningen te gaan renoveren. Maar het bedrag daarvan volstaat echt niet en moet minstens verdubbeld worden. Wijk per wijk moeten we mensen helpen met een collectieve aanpak om die huizen te gaan renoveren, zodat de energierekening daalt en mensen een warme thuis kunnen hebben. Een Europa dat levert voor de mensen, zodat iedereen beter wordt van de energietransitie, daar blijf ik voor vechten.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Dario Tamburrano, a nome del gruppo The Left. 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, compagni e camerati, nel 2022 abbiamo visto triplicare il prezzo dell'elettricit脙聽 e i costi sono ancora oggi comunque insostenibili.

Cittadini e imprese tutte sono permanentemente in povert脙聽 energetica e scarsa competitivit脙聽. Il principio antistorico del merit order lega ancora il prezzo del chilowattora a quello del gas, determinando costi, volatilit脙聽, dipendenza politica e conflitti causati da fattori noti: geologici, geopolitici e speculativi.

Eppure a tutti i livelli politici e mediatici, da diverse parti politiche, sia locali che nazionali, come anche qui in Europa, sono in tanti a fare resistenza con una narrazione terroristica e negazionista verso le comunit脙聽 locali, affermando che le rinnovabili distruggeranno il territorio, finanche l'economia.

La soluzione gi脙聽 esistente 脙篓 invece pronta all'uso: oggi un mix subito di pi脙鹿 rinnovabili, pi脙鹿 idroelettriche, pi脙鹿 stoccaggio energetico. Affinch脙漏 l'elettrificazione dimostri a tutti la sua convenienza, disarticolando questa narrazione tossica, 脙篓 centrale disaccoppiare definitivamente il prezzo del chilowattora rinnovabile da quello fossile: serve anche alla pace.

脗聽脗聽Milan Uhr脙颅k, za skupinu ESN. 芒聙聯 V脙隆脜戮en脙隆 pani predsedaj脙潞ca, samozrejme, 脜戮e pri tak脙陆chto cen脙隆ch energi脙颅 si mlad脙颅 脛戮udia nie脜戮e nechc脙潞, ale nem脙麓脜戮u dovoli脜楼 kupova脜楼 nehnute脛戮nosti, kupova脜楼 domovy, zaklada脜楼 rodiny 脛聧i nebodaj ma脜楼 deti. Samozrejme, 脜戮e star脜隆脙颅 脛戮udia maj脙潞 potom probl脙漏m pre脜戮i脜楼 z mesiaca na mesiac a 脜戮e firmy stagnuj脙潞. Pod脛戮a Medzin脙隆rodnej energetickej agent脙潞ry s脙潞 priemern脙漏 ceny energi脙颅 v Eur脙鲁pe dvoj- a脜戮 trojn脙隆sobne vy脜隆脜隆ie ako v Spojen脙陆ch 脜隆t脙隆toch americk脙陆ch.

M脙隆me najdrah脜隆ie energie na svete. A nie preto, 脜戮e by energie neboli alebo 脜戮e by sa minuli, ale jednoducho preto, 脜戮e prij脙颅mate nezmyseln脙漏 zelen脙漏 rozhodnutia, nezmyseln脙漏 tla脛聧enie脗聽green dealu, nezmyseln脙漏 tla脛聧enie predra脜戮enej zelenej energie a napr脙颅klad aj nezmyseln脙陆ch protienergetick脙陆ch protirusk脙陆ch sankci脙颅. Samozrejme, 脜戮e za tak脙陆chto okolnost脙颅 mus脙颅 v Eur脙鲁pe by脜楼 energetick脙隆 kr脙颅za, ale t脙隆 energetick脙隆 kr脙颅za nie je sama od seba. Ona nepri脜隆la sama od seba, priatelia. Vy ste t脙隆 energetick脙隆 kr脙颅za, ktor脙隆 tr脙隆pi Eur脙鲁pu.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Se脙隆n Kelly (PPE). 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, tackling the rise in energy prices must be an economic and social priority. Families are struggling to heat their homes and European businesses are finding it harder to stay competitive.

To address this, we must first identify the root causes of high bills. The recent energy crisis has shown us the dangers of our reliance on volatile fossil fuels. The cost of imported fuels dictate Europe's electricity prices, undermining our competitiveness and leaving us exposed to geopolitical price shocks.

Additionally, taxes and levies account for a significant portion of our energy bills. While some are essential for infrastructure and renewable investment, we must ensure efficiency to relieve the burden on consumers and industries as far as possible.

The solution to the first part of the problem is clear: we must reduce and eventually eliminate the role of volatile fossil fuel markets in setting out electricity prices. In Ireland in October, the day with the most renewables on the system had an average price of nearly EUR脗聽90 lower than the day with the least renewables on the system.脗聽Our competitiveness can no longer be at the mercy of external energy supplies.

At the same time, we cannot ignore another key challenge: modernising our electricity grid.脗聽I look forward to working with incoming Commissioner Dan脗聽J脙赂rgensen to ensure that Europe delivers affordable, reliable and sustainable energy for all in a modernised grid. Finally, thank the outgoing Commissioner Kadri脗聽Simson for all her good work, cooperation and friendship.

Mo cheol th脙潞 agus go n-脙漏ir脙颅 go geal leat.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Giorgio Gori (S&D). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, l'aumento del costo dell'energia, l'inflazione e la contrazione del potere di acquisto di milioni di famiglie europee hanno causato un forte aumento della povert脙聽 energetica.

Ci aspettiamo che la Commissione assuma questo problema come una priorit脙聽, valorizzando anche le iniziative nate dalla societ脙聽 civile.

Il Banco dell'energia, per esempio, 脙篓 un'organizzazione non-profit italiana nata nel 2016 per iniziativa del gruppo A2A, a cui partecipano importanti imprese del settore energetico ed enti del terzo settore. Queste realt脙聽 contribuiscono al Banco dell'energia con donazioni in cash o in kind per supportare persone e famiglie e contrastare la povert脙聽 energetica.

In questi anni il Banco dell'energia ha raccolto e donato oltre 12 milioni di euro, aiutando 13.000 famiglie e promosso 150 progetti: dal pagamento delle utenze alla sostituzione di apparecchi obsoleti, dalla formazione al sostegno di nuove comunit脙聽 energetiche rinnovabili.

Ci auguriamo che la Commissione valorizzi esperienze come questa e contribuisca a moltiplicarle affiancandole all'iniziativa pubblica.

脗聽脗聽Andr脙隆s Gy脙录rk (PfE). 芒聙聯 Tisztelt Eln脙露k Asszony! Br脙录sszel 脙颅g脙漏retei ellen脙漏re 脙潞jfent az egekben vannak az energia脙隆rak. Febru脙隆r 脙鲁ta a f脙露ldg脙隆z 脙隆ra megdupl脙隆z脙鲁dott. V脙隆llalkoz脙隆saink 脙潞jabb neh脙漏z t脙漏l el脙漏 n脙漏znek. A hideg id脜聭j脙隆r脙隆s bek脙露sz脙露nt脙漏vel pedig minden tizedik eur脙鲁pai csal脙隆dnak okoz gondot otthon脙隆nak felf脜卤t脙漏se.

A helyzet s脙潞lyos, ez脙漏rt azonnali cselekv脙漏sre van sz脙录ks脙漏g. El脜聭sz脙露r is nem szabad脙颅thatjuk r脙隆 a piaci energia脙隆rakat a lakoss脙隆gra. Erre egy j脙鲁 gyakorlat a magyar rezsics脙露kkent脙漏s, melynek r脙漏v脙漏n a magyar csal脙隆dok rezsisz脙隆ml脙隆i ma a legalacsonyabbak Eur脙鲁pa szerte. M脙隆sodszor val脙鲁di energiaszolidarit脙隆sra van sz脙录ks脙漏g. Br脙录sszelnek v脙漏gre ki kell 脙隆llnia a tag脙隆llamok energiaell脙隆t脙隆s脙隆nak biztons脙隆ga mellett. Nemet kell mondanunk az energiaimportot 脙漏rint脜聭 szankci脙鲁kra 脙漏s korl脙隆toz脙隆sokra.

V脙漏g脙录l, a lehet脜聭 leghamarabb az eur脙鲁pai piaci energia脙隆rak cs脙露kken脙漏s脙漏t eredm脙漏nyez脜聭 d脙露nt脙漏seket kell hoznunk. S脙录rg脜聭sen meg kell kezdeni a b脙录rokrat脙隆k 脙隆ltal rosszul fel脙隆ll脙颅tott 脙隆rk脙漏pletek fel脙录lvizsg脙隆lat脙隆t. Csak 脙颅gy lehet a polg脙隆rok sz脙隆m脙隆ra egy versenyk脙漏pesebb Eur脙鲁p脙隆t kialak脙颅tani. Mi, patri脙鲁t脙隆k ez脙漏rt k脙录zd脙录nk.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Mariateresa Vivaldini (ECR). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, signora Commissaria, la crisi dell'energia ed il relativo aumento dei prezzi sono stati affrontati dall'Unione europea con misure di emergenza che ne hanno contenuto i drammatici effetti. Ma la situazione 脙篓 ancora critica: mina la competitivit脙聽 delle imprese e la sostenibilit脙聽 dei costi di energia, con conseguente impoverimento delle famiglie.

La povert脙聽 energetica colpisce circa 50 milioni di persone in Europa, persone che attendono risposte concrete. La transizione energetica deve perci脙虏 essere bilanciata dalla sicurezza energetica sia nelle scelte che nei tempi di attuazione.

La direttiva "case green" non costituisce al momento una soluzione ma un ulteriore e gravoso onere per molti cittadini. Dobbiamo avere il coraggio di guardare a soluzioni senza pregiudizi ideologici, per garantire a famiglie ed imprese l'accesso all'energia ad un prezzo equo.

Urge riconsiderare l'energia nucleare, per anni demonizzata, attraverso l'utilizzo di piccoli reattori modulari per la produzione di energia rinnovabile a basso costo. 脙聢 questa la direzione che dobbiamo prendere.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Brigitte van den Berg (Renew). 芒聙聯 Madam President, Miss Simpson, I'm very happy to be part of your last debate in this House. We are discussing a very well-discussed topic: high energy prices. I want to focus on those who always put this together with criticism on the Green Deal, because they are denying that green energy is the most cheap energy.

It was only two years ago that across Europe, so many people faced unbearable insecurity and stress because of soaring energy prices. Now I worry that some Members in this House are leading us towards another energy crisis, cheering on Mr Trump, who only puts his own interests first.

So it is time for Europe to stand on our own feet. We have to get a good collaboration with the leaders that not only prioritise their own progress, but collective progress. We have to understand that the Green Deal is about saving the planet, about getting cheaper energy and about our position in the world.

Let's get it on.

脗聽脗聽

VORSITZ: KATARINA BARLEY

脗聽脗聽Maria Ohisalo (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Arvoisa puhemies, komissaari, ainakin joka kymmenes eurooppalainen el脙陇脙陇 energiak脙露yhyydess脙陇. Siis n脙陇in moni eurooppalainen ei selviydy v脙陇ltt脙陇m脙陇tt脙露mist脙陇 l脙陇mmitys- ja s脙陇hk脙露kustannuksista.

Fossiilienergian lis脙陇脙陇minen ei ole vastaus t脙陇h脙陇n kriisiin, vaan nopea irtautuminen siit脙陇 on. Riippuvuus fossiilienergiasta on nimitt脙陇in valtava turvallisuusuhka Euroopalle sek脙陇 uhka ihmisten arjen turvallisuudelle. Energiatehokkuus onkin avain energiak脙露yhyyden ennaltaehk脙陇isyss脙陇.

Suomessa on vihreiden aloitteesta otettu k脙陇ytt脙露脙露n energiaomavaraisuuslainat kotitalouksien tueksi. Meid脙陇n vihreiden tavoitteena on saada t脙陇m脙陇 malli kaikkialle Eurooppaan, jotta voimme nopeasti v脙陇hent脙陇脙陇 eurooppalaista energiak脙露yhyytt脙陇 ja riippuvuutta terroristivaltio Ven脙陇j脙陇st脙陇.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Leila Chaibi (The Left). 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, chers coll脙篓gues, il fera 2脗聽脗掳C脗聽脙聽 Strasbourg demain matin.

Pour des millions de m脙漏nages, il va falloir choisir: choisir entre payer ses factures d'脙漏nergie et remplir son frigo; avoir froid ou avoir faim; prendre ses douches froides ou sauter des repas; garder son manteau chez soi et avoir quand m脙陋me le nez froid. Parce que l'on habite dans une passoire thermique ou parce que les factures explosent, et alors m脙陋me que les profits des fournisseurs d'脙漏nergie atteignent des records.

Depuis ce matin, c'est officiel: l'Union europ脙漏enne a un commissaire au logement. Mais pour quoi faire? Pour dire aux Europ脙漏ens de mettre des cols roul脙漏s, comme a os脙漏 le faire le gouvernement fran脙搂ais? S'il vous pla脙庐t, n'ajoutez pas de l'affront au m脙漏pris. Il faut d脙漏sormais une politique europ脙漏enne de lutte contre la pr脙漏carit脙漏 脙漏nerg脙漏tique, et cela passe d'abord par trois actions concr脙篓tes.

Premi脙篓rement, bloquer les prix de l'脙漏nergie, deuxi脙篓mement, sortir des r脙篓gles absurdes du march脙漏 de l'脙漏lectricit脙漏 et, troisi脙篓mement, r脙漏nover les passoires thermiques, sans que cela augmente le prix des loyers. Se chauffer est un droit qui doit 脙陋tre garanti 脙聽 tous et 脙聽 toutes, pas un luxe pour quelques-uns.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Markus Buchheit (ESN). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin, meine sehr verehrten Damen und Herren! Manchmal fragt man sich schon, wo man hier gelandet ist. Es ist eigentlich auch ein pathologischer Grad der Realit脙陇tsverweigerung, wenn man hier drin gerade h脙露rt:脗聽Green Deal, und gr脙录ne Energie sei g脙录nstige Energie. Meine Damen und Herren, der eine oder andere hat vielleicht nicht mitbekommen, dass wir in der vergangenen Woche in Deutschland f脙录nf Tage Dunkelflaute hatten und dass es dann gar nicht so g脙录nstig ist, wie hier im Saale behauptet wird. Und Sie sagen: Das ist Shit. Es ist genau so; es ist eine L脙录ge zu sagen, gr脙录ne Energie w脙陇re g脙录nstige Energie. Gr脙录ne Energie ist Flatterwind, und das ist Flatterstrom. Und die gesamte EU leidet gerade unter dem deutschen Sonderweg, der bis 2035 alleine 1脗聽240脗聽Milliarden脗聽Euro kosten wird.

In diesem Sinne darf ich die Frage stellen: Ist gr脙录ne Energie wirklich die Zukunft? Das kann es nicht sein, meine Damen und Herren. Wir brauchen g脙录nstige Preise脗聽芒聙聯 das haben Sie, Kollegin, vielleicht nicht erkannt脗聽芒聙聯 f脙录r unsere Industrie. ZF, Thyssen, Continental bauen allein 脙录ber 40脗聽000 Stellen ab, und das ist auch Ihre Schuld. Das ist die Schuld der Gr脙录nen. Ich kann in diesem Sinne nur meine Worte an die Kommission richten: Lassen Sie endlich Vernunft in Deutschland einkehren und dr脙陇ngen Sie auf die Deutschen, dass wir wieder zur脙录ckfinden zur Kernkraft und zur Abkehr vom Green Deal.

脗聽脗聽Markus Buchheit (ESN), Antwort auf eine Frage nach dem Verfahren der 芒聙聻blauen Karte芒聙聹. 芒聙聯 Herr Kollege, es w脙陇re sch脙露n, wenn es so w脙陇re. 脗聽脗聽Maravillas Abad脙颅a Jover (PPE). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, en la Uni脙鲁n Europea cada vez m脙隆s hogares tienen dificultades para calentar sus casas y el porcentaje de quienes no pueden hacerlo ha aumentado hasta el 10脗聽%. Noi, politicienii, asta credem; c脛聝 ei se 脙庐ngrijoreaz脛聝 din cauza alegerilor, c脙垄nd, de fapt, 5脗聽milioane dintre ei se 脙庐ngrijoreaz脛聝 c脛聝 nu au lemne de foc. De脠聶i muncesc, nu-脠聶i permit facturi la gaz 脠聶i le e frig. 脙聨n aceste zile, mul脠聸i dintre noi avem mai tare 脙庐n g脙垄nd: 芒聙聻trebuie s脛聝 dau c脛聝ldura mai 脙庐ncet芒聙聺 sau 芒聙聻pe cine votez?芒聙聺. Vreau s脛聝 v脛聝 spun a脠聶a, dragi rom脙垄ni 脠聶i dragi europeni: este foarte important s脛聝 vota脠聸i oameni c脛聝rora le pas脛聝 de locuire, de energie, ca de un drept 脠聶i nu ca de o marf脛聝.

脗聽脗聽Rudi Kennes (The Left). 芒聙聯 Voorzitter, commissaris, de energieprijzen schieten weer eens omhoog. En weten jullie wat dat betekent voor de gewone mensen in Europa? Dat betekent dat meer en meer mensen de keuze moeten maken tussen een warme maaltijd of het verwarmen van hun huis. Dit is een ramp voor gewone gezinnen, die telkens opnieuw angsten uitstaan wanneer ze hun energierekening verwachten. Maar het is ook een ramp voor de industrie. Slechts de allergrootste multinationals kunnen vandaag de dag nog min of meer langdurige contracten afsluiten. Maar de gewone mensen en de kmo芒聙聶s zijn afhankelijk van de grillen van de door jullie zo bejubelde vrije markt.

Er dreigt een tsunami aan bedrijfssluitingen, die grotendeels het gevolg zijn van de huidige hoge energieprijzen in Europa. Het is zeer belangrijk om voor die energie, en dus voor de prijzen, opnieuw te zorgen voor publieke controle, zodat we iedereen lagere en stabielere energieprijzen kunnen aanbieden. Want dat is goed voor de mensen, dat is goed voor de gezinnen, maar het is ook goed voor de industrie. Hier in de Europese bubbel is het natuurlijk lekker warm. Maar hierbuiten is het een heel ander verhaal. Wat gaan jullie daaraan doen?

脗聽脗聽Dirk Gotink (PPE). 芒聙聯 Voorzitter, de cijfers over energiearmoede in Europa zijn schokkend en ook onacceptabel. In 2022 durfden meer dan zeshonderdduizend huishoudens in Nederland de kachel amper aan te zetten. E脙漏n op de tien Europeanen 芒聙聯 we hoorden het al vaak in dit debat 芒聙聯 voelt aan den lijve hoe energieprijzen de woonlasten omhoogdrijven en onhoudbaar worden. Het is kiezen tussen een warme woning en andere basisbehoeften.

En de overheid laat ondernemers in de steek, door een gebrek aan netcapaciteit. Deze onzekerheden zijn niet alleen een obstakel voor de energietransitie, maar ondermijnen ook ons vertrouwen in de overheid. Dit betekent dat we de huishoudens en ondernemers weer meer energiezekerheid moeten bieden. Dit moeten we doen door te investeren in innovatieve oplossingen voor een betrouwbare energie芒聙聭infrastructuur en het bouwen van energie芒聙聭effici脙芦nte woningen, met meer energie van eigen bodem. We moeten de bestaanszekerheid van huishoudens centraal stellen en zorgen voor een energietransitie die betaalbaar is en die onze samenleving bij elkaar houdt.

脗聽脗聽Jens Geier (S&D). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin! Mein erster Satz geht auch an Sie, verehrte Frau Simson, vielen herzlichen Dank f脙录r Ihre Arbeit in der Europ脙陇ischen Kommission. Nat脙录rlich w脙录rde es keinen Sinn machen, hohe Energiekosten durch hohe Netzkosten zu ersetzen. Da m脙录ssen dann die 脙露ffentlichen Haushalte die Netztarife vor脙录bergehend dr脙录cken. Und an alle diejenigen, die an die Kernkraft glauben: Mir sagen deutsche Energiemanager, dass sie keinesfalls in die Kernenergie zur脙录ckwollen. Die ist zu teuer.

脗聽脗聽Georg Mayer (PfE). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin, gesch脙陇tzte Kollegen! Tun wir doch nicht so, als ob diese hohen Energiepreise zuf脙陇llig vom Himmel gefallen w脙陇ren. 脗聽脗聽Oihane Agirregoitia Mart脙颅nez (Renew). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, ahora que ya tenemos nuevo Colegio de Comisarios (y Comisarias), vamos a acelerar y a poner el foco en aquellos temas que est脙隆n preocupando a la gente. 脗聽脗聽Benedetta Scuderi (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, la signora Giovanna ha 81 anni ed 脙篓 costretta a vivere in una casa umida, fredda e piena di spifferi, senza poter pagare per il proprio riscaldamento.脗聽Nel 2023 sono 47 milioni gli europei che sono in questa condizione, non potendo riscaldarsi adeguatamente, cucinare, spostarsi o accendere la luce.

L'Europa deve mettere la tutela della sua popolazione prima del profitto di pochi, quei pochi che lucrano sui prezzi dell'energia registrando guadagni da record: le sei pi脙鹿 grandi compagnie petrolifere europee, nel solo primo trimestre del 2022, hanno guadagnato 75 miliardi di extra profitti, gli stessi pochi che ricevono 400 miliardi l'anno in sussidi pubblici ai fossili.

Queste risorse economiche appartengono alle persone e dovrebbero tornare alle persone. Iniziando da queste risorse, potremmo finalmente investire nelle energie rinnovabili, che sono il modo migliore per abbassare i prezzi dell'energia, oppure nelle comunit脙聽 energetiche, per un'energia per e delle persone.

Potremmo sostenere un piano per aiutare la popolazione ad efficientare le proprie case tramite finanziamenti e prestiti, come abbiamo chiesto al Commissario J脙赂rgensen, per consentire di vivere meglio e ridurre drasticamente il costo delle bollette.

Ricordiamoci la nostra promessa di non lasciare nessuno indietro: ora troppe persone sono indietro. Dobbiamo agire.

Tak脙漏 firmy se kv脜炉li vysok脙陆m energi脙颅m dost脙隆vaj脙颅 do obrovsk脙陆ch probl脙漏m脜炉, co脜戮 vede k propou脜隆t脛聸n脙颅 zam脛聸stnanc脜炉 a zav脙颅r脙隆n脙颅 脜戮ivnost脙颅.

Tento probl脙漏m je skute脛聧n脛聸 obrovsk脙陆 a Evropsk脙隆 unie jej sv脙陆mi politikami d脙隆le zhor脜隆uje. P脜聶脙颅kladem jsou emisn脙颅 povolenky, jejich脜戮 ceny jsou nep脜聶edv脙颅dateln脙漏 a neust脙隆le rostou. 脗聽脗聽Vladimir Prebili脛聧 (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Spo脜隆tovana predsednica! Spo脜隆tovane kolegice in kolegi!

Porast cen energije ni zgolj ekonomsko vpra脜隆anje. To je izziv, ki posega v samo bistvo socialne pravi脛聧nosti in trajnosti. Zato moramo odlo脛聧no ukrepati.

Danes se milijoni Evropejcev soo脛聧ajo z energetsko rev脜隆脛聧ino in kruto izbiro med ogrevanjem svojih domov ter pre脜戮ivetjem. 脗聽脗聽Jo脙拢o Oliveira (The Left). 芒聙聯 Senhores Deputados, h脙隆 20 anos, Dur脙拢o Barroso apregoava a liberaliza脙搂脙拢o do setor da energia, dizendo que a concorr脙陋ncia faria baixar os pre脙搂os. Aconteceu exatamente o contr脙隆rio. Hoje, dizem-nos que a transi脙搂脙拢o energ脙漏tica e a redu脙搂脙拢o dos pre脙搂os da energia se conseguir脙拢o com mais liberaliza脙搂脙拢o. Est脙拢o outra vez a enganar-nos, escolhendo bons pretextos para esconder p脙漏ssimas pol脙颅ticas.

E a situa脙搂脙拢o em Portugal 脙漏 exemplo disso mesmo. A produ脙搂脙拢o de energia a partir de fontes renov脙隆veis em Portugal j脙隆 脙漏 muito mais expressiva que a produzida a partir de fontes n脙拢o renov脙隆veis. No entanto, o mecanismo europeu de forma脙搂脙拢o de pre脙搂os faz-nos pagar a energia ao pre脙搂o do custo das fontes de energia n脙拢o renov脙隆veis mais caras.

As consequ脙陋ncias est脙拢o 脙聽 vista. Temos a maior percentagem da Uni脙拢o Europeia de pessoas que n脙拢o podem aquecer adequadamente a casa. As pequenas empresas s脙拢o duramente penalizadas pela fatura energ脙漏tica, mas os grupos econ脙鲁micos do setor energ脙漏tico multiplicam os seus lucros.

脙聣 preciso uma pol脙颅tica energ脙漏tica que sirva as popula脙搂脙碌es e o desenvolvimento nacional. N脙拢o basta invocar a transi脙搂脙拢o energ脙漏tica. 脙聣 preciso intervir na forma脙搂脙拢o dos pre脙搂os da energia e assumir o controlo p脙潞blico do setor estrat脙漏gico.

脗聽脗聽Katar脙颅na Roth Neve脛聫alov脙隆 (NI). 芒聙聯 V脙隆脜戮en脙隆 pani predsedaj脙潞ca, predo脜隆l脙隆 slovensk脙隆 vl脙隆da, ktor脙隆 bola pravicov脙隆, odpor脙潞脛聧ala 脛戮u脛聫om pri zvy脜隆ovan脙颅 ceny energie, 脜戮e maj脙潞 vari脜楼 s pokrievkou, 脜戮e maj脙潞 vetra脜楼 iba chv脙颅脛戮u doma a 脜戮e maj脙潞 tak piec脜楼, aby piekli nieko脛戮ko vec脙颅 naraz. Ur脛聧ite treba aj lep脜隆iu soci脙隆lnu podporu pre zranite脛戮n脙漏 skupiny, boj proti chudobe, ktor脙陆 bude podmienen脙陆 spravodliv脙陆m zda脜聢ovan脙颅m, a podporu jadrovej energie, preto脜戮e to je naozaj t脙隆 脛聧ist脙隆 energia, ktorej dok脙隆脜戮eme vyrobi脜楼 dostatok na to, aby sme zabezpe脛聧ili pre 脛戮ud脙颅 dostatok energie za dobr脙潞 cenu.

M脜聢a fascinuje, 脜戮e napr脙颅klad v Belgicku, kde v脙陇脛聧脜隆ina z n脙隆s teda nejak脙陆m sp脙麓sobom preb脙陆va, s脙潞 st脙隆le napr脙颅klad byty prenaj脙颅man脙漏 s jednoduch脙陆mi sklami, cez ktor脙漏 prefukuje, pri脛聧om je to miesto, kde ve脛戮a pr脜隆脙颅, kde ve脛戮a f脙潞ka vietor a v脜隆etci vedia, 脜戮e takto ve脛戮mi ve脛戮a energie unik脙隆. 脜陆e pou脜戮脙颅vame napr脙颅klad v Belgicku st脙隆le akumula脛聧n脙漏 kachle, o ktor脙陆ch vieme, 脜戮e s脙潞 absol脙潞tne energeticky nev脙陆hodn脙漏. 脛聦i脜戮e treba za脛聧a脜楼 aj v tom srdci Eur脙鲁pskej 脙潞nie, aj v tom Belgicku, pou脜戮脙颅va脜楼 naozaj tak脙漏 technol脙鲁gie, ktor脙漏 bud脙潞 dobr脙漏.

脗聽脗聽S脙漏rgio Humberto (PPE). 芒聙聯 Senhora Presidente, Senhora Comiss脙隆ria, Caras e Caros Colegas, hoje falamos neste plen脙隆rio do aumento dos pre脙搂os da energia e do combate 脙聽 pobreza energ脙漏tica. Portugal e Espanha s脙拢o, neste momento, uma ilha energ脙漏tica. A quantidade de energia que passa da Pen脙颅nsula Ib脙漏rica para o resto dos Estados芒聙聭Membros 脙漏 inferior a 5 %.

Meus caros, fa脙搂o aqui um apelo 脙聽s institui脙搂脙碌es europeias para que isto seja uma quest脙拢o europeia e n脙拢o apenas uma quest脙拢o de Portugal e Espanha com a Fran脙搂a. As interliga脙搂脙碌es el脙漏tricas e de hidrog脙漏nio s脙拢o de extrema import脙垄ncia para os pa脙颅ses do centro da Europa.

Precisamos de uma verdadeira uni脙拢o energ脙漏tica, de um mercado 脙潞nico integrado, que vai permitir um aumento da competitividade nas empresas e chegar a pre脙搂os mais acess脙颅veis para as pessoas aquecerem as suas casas. N脙鲁s estamos aqui, com uma energia verde mais barata, dispon脙颅veis para partilhar com todos.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Nicol脙隆s Gonz脙隆lez Casares (S&D). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, es el tercer invierno tras la invasi脙鲁n de Ucrania por Rusia y seguimos teniendo problemas con el gas, que se traducen tambi脙漏n en una subida de los precios de la electricidad, pero tenemos herramientas y tenemos mucha legislaci脙鲁n que implementar. Tenemos soluciones: hay herramientas en las manos de los Estados miembros 芒聙聰y tambi脙漏n de la Comisi脙鲁n芒聙聰 para poner en marcha. Tenemos, por ejemplo, un mecanismo para hacer frente a los shocks de precios. Adem脙隆s, es un mecanismo objetivo y mesurable, que permite declarar una crisis de precios y actuar para limitarlos temporalmente. Por lo tanto, tenemos herramientas: us脙漏moslas.

A medio plazo, adem脙隆s, debemos fomentar el desacoplamiento de los precios de los f脙鲁siles de los de las renovables, es decir, tomar ventaja de los bajos precios de las renovables. Tambi脙漏n est脙隆n las reglas del mercado el脙漏ctrico. Y, por cierto, hemos reforzado la protecci脙鲁n de los consumidores vulnerables, prohibiendo su desconexi脙鲁n durante las crisis de precios. Por lo tanto, es el momento de la implementaci脙鲁n. Tenemos herramientas. Hay que darles confianza a los ciudadanos europeos de que esta C脙隆mara, de que las instituciones europeas piensan en ellos. Por eso, tenemos que implementar las medidas que ya est脙隆n en marcha.

Le deseamos suerte a la nueva Comisi脙鲁n. Tambi脙漏n le deseamos mucha suerte a la comisaria Simson y le agradecemos su trabajo estos a脙卤os. Y, como dec脙颅a, le deseamos suerte a la nueva Comisi脙鲁n, que tiene la energ脙颅a en manos de dos personas muy competentes, como son Dan J脙赂rgensen y la vicepresidenta Teresa Ribera.

脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Niels Fuglsang (S&D). 芒聙聯 Fru formand! Mere end hver tiende europ脙娄er var ude af stand til at holde deres hjem varmt sidste vinter. I nogle lande var det hver femte, der fr脙赂s. Det er langt over fyrre millioner mennesker i EU. I 脙楼r forventes det, at vinteren bliver endnu koldere end sidste 脙楼r. Det er fuldst脙娄ndig uacceptabelt, at vi st脙楼r i en situation, hvor s脙楼 mange mennesker bliver n脙赂dt til at fryse og ikke har r脙楼d til at holde deres hus varmt. Og vi bliver n脙赂dt til at g脙赂re mere, end vi g脙赂r nu. Den vej, der er ud af den her krise, er at s脙娄tte endnu mere fart p脙楼 vedvarende energi og energieffektivitet, s脙楼 vi kan blive uafh脙娄ngige af dyr gas, som vi importerer udefra. Jeg vil gerne benytte lejligheden, da jeg tror det er en af de sidste gange, vi debatterer med kommiss脙娄r Simson hernede i salen, til at takke kommiss脙娄ren for deres arbejde for netop den her dagsorden. Det tror jeg er det, der er brug for, og jeg tror, at vi skal s脙娄tte endnu mere fart p脙楼. S脙楼 lad os bygge p脙楼 det, som vi sammen har opn脙楼et, og lad os g脙楼 videre i den retning. Det tror jeg ogs脙楼, kommiss脙娄r Dan J脙赂rgensen vil forts脙娄tte. S脙楼 tak for det og tak for samarbejdet.

脗聽脗聽Bruno Gon脙搂alves (S&D). 芒聙聯 Senhora Presidente, Colegas, Senhora Comiss脙隆ria, muito obrigado pelo seu trabalho. Como disse Mario Draghi, a energia est脙隆 no centro da economia, nas ind脙潞strias tradicionais, mas tamb脙漏m em novos setores, como a intelig脙陋ncia artificial, onde o custo da energia 脙漏 decisivo para as empresas. Se queremos recuperar a competitividade, atrair ind脙潞strias inovadoras e empregos qualificados para a Europa, para que esta n脙拢o seja a gera脙搂脙拢o mais bem qualificada de sempre, mas a melhor paga, o custo da energia 脙漏 decisivo. Se queremos, temos de come脙搂ar j脙隆 o caminho para garantir energia limpa e barata, para as empresas, sim, mas tamb脙漏m para as pessoas.

N脙拢o 脙漏 aceit脙隆vel que para milh脙碌es de cidad脙拢os o inverno signifique ter frio dentro de casa. Cumprir esse des脙颅gnio implica levar a uni脙拢o energ脙漏tica do papel 脙聽 realidade, completar, finalmente, as interliga脙搂脙碌es entre os nossos pa脙颅ses para desbloquear mais investimento. Simplificar regras sem desregular o mercado para facilitar a vida de todos. Mais fundos europeus para a produ脙搂脙拢o energ脙漏tica limpa e barata. N脙拢o podemos recuar na hora de transformar as nossas palavras em a脙搂脙拢o. 脙聣 isto que esperam os nossos cidad脙拢os. 脙聣 tempo de garantirmos liberdade no acesso 脙聽 energia barata para todos os cidad脙拢os europeus.

脗聽脗聽Bruno Tobback (S&D). 芒聙聯 Madam President, Commissioner, colleagues, high energy prices are a social issue that today leaves millions of families struggling to afford basic comfort in their homes. And yet millions of those homes are leaking heat as if it were for free, because owners cannot afford a renovation. With energy prices higher than in competing markets, they are a burden on our industry's competitiveness. Yet at the same time, on this windy and breezy day, we probably see negative prices on the European market because we lack the infrastructure to get that abundant renewable production to factories and families that could put it to good use.

So what we need now more than ever is a sustained and coherent strategy to deploy all the cheap, renewable production that we can, to use instruments like the Social Climate Fund to improve homes and lives of families that are unable to do it for themselves, and to invest in the infrastructure that gets electricity to homes and businesses, because electricity grids are to our prosperity what highways were to our parents. Let us be as daring to invest in that as they were in their time.

Na, i脜隆 tikr脜鲁j脜鲁 milijonai europie脛聧i脜鲁 nei脜隆gali 脜隆ildyti savo b脜芦sto ar susimok脛聴ti s脛聟skait脜鲁 u脜戮 energijos tiekim脛聟. Energijos kain脜鲁 脜隆uolis nuo karo Ukrainoje prad脜戮ios paliet脛聴 visus, ta脛聧iau ypa脛聧 pa脜戮eid脜戮iamiausius m脜芦s脜鲁 脜戮mones.

Energetinis skurdas i脜隆 tikr脜鲁j脜鲁 yra daugialyp脛聴 problema ir sud脛聴tin脛聴 bendro skurdo dalis, kuri apima ir 脜戮moni脜鲁 pajamas, kurios neatitinka realaus pragyvenimo, ir kain脜鲁 lyg脛炉, taip pat prast脛聟 pastat脜鲁 energetin脛炉 efektyvum脛聟, ir l脛聴t脛聟 renovacijos proces脛聟 bei spekuliacijas didmenin脛聴je energetikos rinkoje, ir did脜戮iulius energetikos 脛炉moni脜鲁 vir脜隆pelnius.

Iki 脜隆iol energetinis skurdas buvo paliktas valstybi脜鲁 nari脜鲁 kompetencijai, ta脛聧iau mums b脜芦tinas bendras po脜戮i脜芦ris 脛炉 energijos nepritekliaus supratim脛聟 ir 脜隆ios problemos sprendim脛聟 Europos S脛聟jungos lygmeniu.

Tod脛聴l raginu nauj脛聟 Komisij脛聟 kuo skubiau pateikti strategij脛聟 d脛聴l kovos su skurdu, kurioje b脜芦t脜鲁 脛炉trauktas ir energetinis skurdas bei konkre脛聧ios priemon脛聴s, kaip 脛炉veikti 脜隆i脛聟 problem脛聟. Taip pat labai daug tikim脛聴s ir i脜隆 naujojo komisaro, atsakingo u脜戮 b脜芦st脛聟, kad kiekvienas Europos S脛聟jungos pilietis tur脛聴t脜鲁 prieinam脛聟, kokybi脜隆k脛聟 ir energeti脜隆kai efektyv脜鲁 b脜芦st脛聟.

脗聽脗聽Niels Geuking (PPE). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin, Frau Kommissarin! Der weltweite Strukturwandel des Energiemarktes ist noch im vollen Gange. 脙聳l und Gas suchen sich international einfach neue Wege, und gerade die Unternehmen und Menschen in Europa stehen deswegen vor enormen Herausforderungen. Viele bleiben bereits auf der Strecke. Die Deindustrialisierung ist allgegenw脙陇rtig. W脙露chentlich, gar t脙陇glich neue Schreckensmeldungen 脙录ber Unternehmensinsolvenzen, Jobabbau, gar die Verlagerung ins Ausland. Millionen Menschen, insbesondere die Familien, sind an Belastungsgrenzen angekommen. Die h脙露chsten Energiepreise weltweit bedeuten auch f脙录r die ganzen Menschen in Europa Energiearmut und ein gesteigertes Risiko, seine berufliche Existenz zu verlieren. Ein sch脙陇ndlicher Umstand im 21. Jahrhundert.

Die Gestehungskosten von Strom m脙录ssen runter, Speicherkonzepte mit aller Macht europ脙陇isch gedacht und auch vorangetrieben werden. Gemeinsame Energienetze, koordinierter Strommarkt 芒聙聯 ja, mehr Europa und weniger Abh脙陇ngigkeit, auch wenn das nicht alle hier in diesem Hause h脙露ren wollen. Wir m脙录ssen bezahlbare Energie als Grundrecht verstehen und nicht als Ware. Lassen Sie uns mit der neuen Kommission nachhaltig und gemeinsam sicherstellen, dass niemand in der K脙陇lte steht.

脗聽脗聽Margarita de la Pisa Carri脙鲁n (PfE). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidente, se脙卤or脙颅as, la pobreza energ脙漏tica es una consecuencia de las pol脙颅ticas de esta C脙隆mara, apoyadas por muchos de ustedes, que nos han hecho dependientes de terceros o de fuentes no continuas.

Es una verg脙录enza que repitamos una presidencia de la Comisi脙鲁n con una l脙颅nea ideol脙鲁gica que ha llevado a la miseria a familias y a empresas y que, seg脙潞n ha anunciado hoy, va a mantener.

Es ofensivo que esta presidencia cuente con Teresa Ribera, que no solo ha llevado a Espa脙卤a a una situaci脙鲁n energ脙漏tica cr脙颅tica (se ha despedido de su cargo de ministra cerrando la central nuclear de Almaraz) sino que tambi脙漏n es responsable de implantar pol脙颅ticas medioambientales que han agravado la cat脙隆strofe natural de Valencia, que se ha llevado por delante m脙隆s de doscientas vidas y pod脙颅a haberse prevenido.

Cada Estado debe configurar su propia combinaci脙鲁n de fuentes de energ脙颅a para garantizar autonom脙颅a energ脙漏tica con un precio asequible y un suministro abundante. Se han puesto objetivos no realistas que no atienden a las especificidades geogr脙隆ficas o a las necesidades de cada regi脙鲁n.

Es una enorme hipocres脙颅a celebrar este debate sobre pobreza energ脙漏tica cuando no hay intenci脙鲁n de corregir las causas que la provocan.

脗聽脗聽Sebastian Tynkkynen (ECR). 芒聙聯 Arvoisa puhemies, Eurooppa tarvitsee vakaata, puhdasta ja kustannustehokasta energiantuotantoa. Ratkaisu energiakriisiin on aivan nen脙陇mme edess脙陇: ydinvoima. Mutta valitettavasti ei ole Euroopassa itsest脙陇脙陇nselvyys, ett脙陇 se n脙陇hd脙陇脙陇n ratkaisuna.

T脙陇脙陇ll脙陇 on ollut valloillaan ydinvoimaidiotismi. Kerron teille esimerkin, joka kuvastaa hyvin t脙陇t脙陇 idiotismia Euroopassa. Greenpeace pystytti vuonna 2010 keskelle Helsinki脙陇 h脙陇pe脙陇paalun, ison kivilohkareen, johon kaiverrettiin niiden kansanedustajien nimet, jotka 脙陇脙陇nestiv脙陇t ydinvoiman puolesta. 脙聞lyvapaampaa touhua saa etsi脙陇! Greenpeace on itsekin my脙露nt脙陇nyt, ettei vastaavaa h脙陇pe脙陇paalua en脙陇脙陇 pystytett脙陇isi.

Jos jollekin pit脙陇isi Euroopassa pystytt脙陇脙陇 h脙陇pe脙陇paalu, ne ovat ydinvoimaa vastustaneet tahot, kuten Greenpeace ja niiden talutusnuorassa olleet poliitikot. Niille p脙陇脙陇tt脙陇jille Saksassa, jotka ajoivat maan ydinvoimalat alas, sanon: h脙陇vetk脙陇脙陇.

脗聽脗聽Krzysztof Hetman (PPE). 芒聙聯 Pani Przewodnicz脛聟ca! Podczas dzisiejszych wielu debat przewin脛聶脜聜o si脛聶 bardzo cz脛聶sto s脜聜owo 芒聙聻konkurencyjno脜聸脛聡芒聙聺. Tymczasem to koszty energii s脛聟 jednym z czynnik脙鲁w, kt脙鲁re t脛聶 konkurencyjno脜聸脛聡 firm w Unii Europejskiej zabijaj脛聟. Jak europejskie firmy maj脛聟 by脛聡 konkurencyjne w sytuacji, gdy p脜聜ac脛聟 czterokrotnie wi脛聶cej za energi脛聶 ni脜录 ich odpowiednicy poza granicami Unii Europejskiej? Oni ju脜录 w脜聜a脜聸ciwie dzisiaj nie walcz脛聟 o konkurencyjno脜聸脛聡. Europejskie firmy dzisiaj walcz脛聟 o przetrwanie. Przemys脜聜 wapienniczy, przemys脜聜 cementowy powinien natychmiast zacz脛聟脛聡 otrzymywa脛聡 rekompensaty za wzrost koszt脙鲁w po脜聸rednich energii. W innym przypadku przenios脛聟 swoj脛聟 produkcj脛聶 poza Uni脛聶 Europejsk脛聟. Jak europejski przemys脜聜 nawozowy ma konkurowa脛聡 dzisiaj z tanimi rosyjskimi nawozami, kt脙鲁re nap脜聜ywaj脛聟 do Unii Europejskiej, bior脛聟c pod uwag脛聶 ceny gazu w Rosji i w Unii Europejskiej? Dzisiaj wiele s脜聜脙鲁w pad脜聜o ze strony nowej Komisji Europejskiej, ale po czynach j脛聟 poznamy, a nie po s脜聜owach. Mam nadziej脛聶, 脜录e udziel脛聟 tego wsparcia wszystkim przemys脜聜om energoch脜聜onnym w Unii Europejskiej.

脗聽脗聽Katrin Langensiepen (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin! Wir haben ja hier heute ganz oft das Wort competitiveness 芒聙聯 Wettbewerbsf脙陇higkeit 芒聙聯 geh脙露rt und dass ja alle irgendwie bereit sind f脙录r den Wandel. Ich komme aus Niedersachsen, ich komme aus Gro脙聼burgwedel, und Gro脙聼burgwedel ist nicht sehr weit entfernt von Gorleben. Wir wissen, was es bedeutet, wenn man Atomenergie vor der eigenen Haust脙录r hat. Was machen wir mit dem Dreck? Diejenigen, die heute noch mal daf脙录r werben, dass wir die Atomenergie, die alten Schrottmeiler irgendwie noch reanimieren m脙录ssen, die frage ich: Was machen wir mit dem Dreck?

Diesen Dreck m脙录ssen wir den B脙录rgerinnen und B脙录rgern vor unserer Haust脙录r in Gorleben verkaufen. Wir haben Gorleben erkl脙陇rt: Gorleben ist nicht sicher! Gorleben steht f脙录r Rebecca Harms. Rebecca Harms war hier eine gro脙聼e K脙陇mpferin im Europ脙陇ischen Parlament gegen die Atomenergie. Wir m脙录ssen nat脙录rlich auch denjenigen erkl脙陇ren: Wie wollen wir im 21.脗聽Jahrhundert die Energiewende neu gestalten? Die Energiewende f脙录r Unternehmen bedeutet nicht, wir halten an den alten, dreckigen Meilern fest, weil dann diejenigen, die das fordern, mir eine Antwort geben m脙录ssen: Wohin mit dem Dreck? Mit freundlichen Gr脙录脙聼en aus Gorleben!

脗聽脗聽Micha脜聜 Wawrykiewicz (PPE). 芒聙聯 Pani Przewodnicz脛聟ca, Pani Komisarz, Szanowni Pa脜聞stwo! Przys脜聜uchuj脛聟c si脛聶 tej debacie, nie ma w脛聟tpliwo脜聸ci, 脜录e ub脙鲁stwo energetyczne jest pilnym wyzwaniem. Kluczowe jest zrozumienie przyczyn, jakie powoduj脛聟 ub脙鲁stwo energetyczne, i wdro脜录enie odpowiednich dzia脜聜a脜聞. I w tym zakresie nale脜录y spojrze脛聡 si脛聶 na opracowania, opracowania specjalistyczne, jak na przyk脜聜ad Energy Poverty Advisory Hub, na kt脙鲁re spojrza脜聜em. Spojrza脜聜em te脜录 na wiele innych opracowa脜聞. 脜禄adne z nich nie wskazuje na to, aby to transformacja energetyczna by脜聜a odpowiedzialna za ub脙鲁stwo energetyczne. Wskazywane s脛聟 trzy podstawowe przyczyny: rosn脛聟ce ceny energii z r脙鲁脜录nych przyczyn, niestabilne rynki energetyczne, na przyk脜聜ad luki w stosowanych politykach czy niedostateczne inwestycje publiczne oraz zr脙鲁脜录nicowanie klimatyczne i regionalne. Jak temu przeciwdzia脜聜a脛聡? Poprzez likwidowanie luk w stosowanych politykach oraz luk rynkowych, poprzez popraw脛聶 efektywno脜聸ci energetycznej, poprzez podnoszenie 脜聸wiadomo脜聸ci obywatelskiej i poprzez promowanie energii odnawialnej i m脛聟dre transformowanie energetyczne.

脗聽脗聽Grzegorz Braun (NI). 芒聙聯 Madam President, so you are all hidden engineers now and fossil traders, and you are presenting here the whole range of your Green Deal, global warming, climate change, superstitious 芒聙聯 everything to make European taxpayers pay more and more for your inefficient doctrinal projects, and to pay more and more and more for heating.

God help me, I will never, ever betray my people, my compatriots. And I will do everything to withdraw Poland from this crazy business that is making poor people even more poor, and rich people even more rich.

This is simply the new Soviet Union. Some 70 years ago, the answer for every question was social justice and Americans dropping bags from aeroplanes so that crop couldn't grow. That was the answer. Now I can hear your answers: Green Deal 芒聙聯 this is all superstition, this is not based on facts, this is not based on science, this climate change is the policy of wind whisperers.

脗聽脗聽Marta Wcis脜聜o (PPE). 芒聙聯 Pani Przewodnicz脛聟ca! Szanowni Pa脜聞stwo! Polacy p脜聜ac脛聟 najwy脜录sze ceny energii w Europie. W 2023 roku 11% Polak脙鲁w cierpia脜聜o z powodu ub脙鲁stwa energetycznego, z czego 1/4 to emeryci i renci脜聸ci. Problemy z wysokimi cenami generuj脛聟 te脜录 problemy dla firm, kt脙鲁re zamykaj脛聟 si脛聶 z tego powodu. To pok脜聜osie 8 lat z脜聜ych, niew脜聜a脜聸ciwych rz脛聟d脙鲁w PiS-u, kt脙鲁ry nie postawi脜聜 na transformacj脛聶 energetyczn脛聟, kt脙鲁ry pieni脛聟dze z systemu ETS 芒聙聯 100 miliard脙鲁w z脜聜otych 芒聙聯 nie przekaza脜聜 na budow脛聶 nowych sieci, ale na polityk脛聶 partyjn脛聟. To zaoranie polityki wiatrowej. M脙鲁wiono nam, Polakom, 脜录e 脜聸mig脜聜a z wiatrak脙鲁w b脛聶d脛聟 spada脜聜y na domy, a kury przestan脛聟 si脛聶 nosi脛聡. Takie by脜聜o podej脜聸cie do transformacji energetycznej.

Szanowni Pa脜聞stwo! Zwracam si脛聶 do Komisji Europejskiej z pro脜聸b脛聟 o podj脛聶cie systemowych i skutecznych dzia脜聜a脜聞, kt脙鲁re wp脜聜yn脛聟 na obni脜录enie cen energii w Polsce i w Europie. Nie mo脜录e by脛聡 tak, 脜录e w XXI wieku ludzie musz脛聟 wybiera脛聡, czy kupuj脛聟 leki czy w脜聜脛聟cz脛聟 pr脛聟d.

脗聽脗聽

脗聽脗聽Lukas Sieper (NI). 芒聙聯 Madam President, Commissioner, food, safety, energy: that is everything that keeps us from anarchy as human beings. Everything that leads people from distrusting a system if it is missing. And now, in this so very important debate, on average 芒聙聯 I counted it 芒聙聯 we had 20 MEPs sitting in this room.

I know, unfortunately, this is not how it's working here in this Parliament. I know the number of MEPs present does not mean that we don't care, but you have to see it from the eyes of the people. If someone now opened the live stream of the European Parliament who is affected by these problems, what should he or she think? And who has a right to judge our work here, if not the people?

So I ask all of you, please take this topic way more seriously than the amount of people in this room would suggest. It is the one thing holding our society together.

(Ende der spontanen Wortmeldungen)

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Kadri Simson, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Madam President, honourable Members, many thanks for this fruitful exchange. The Commission is deeply committed to making sure that all Europeans have access to essential energy services. I strongly believe that all the work done by the Commission, the Council, but also by the European Parliament has created a strong foundation for the future. This groundwork is a great legacy for the next Commission to build on and make further progress.

I have had great cooperation with Dan J脙赂rgensen over the past years, and I am convinced that he will ensure continued political momentum and help to make energy prices more affordable. I am sure you will follow this work very closely, because your involvement will be critical to ensuring that the energy transition benefits everyone, and that the necessary steps are taken to greatly reduce energy poverty.

Honourable Members, thank you for your trust, for the many exchanges we have had and for the constructive work we did together over the past five years. I wish you all the best.

脗聽脗聽Csaba Moln脙隆r (S&D), 脙颅r脙隆sban. 芒聙聯 Az Eur脙鲁pai Uni脙鲁 2022 脙鲁ta, azaz a h脙隆bor脙潞 kit脙露r脙漏s脙漏nek 脙漏s az ezzel egy脙录tt j脙隆r脙鲁 energiav脙隆ls脙隆g kezdet脙漏t脜聭l deklar脙隆ltan azon dolgozik, hogy energiabiztons脙隆got hozzon l脙漏tre. Ennek 脙漏rdek脙漏ben megreform脙隆lt脙隆k az uni脙鲁s energiapiacokat, c脙漏lzott t脙隆mogat脙隆st ny脙潞jtanak azoknak, akik energiaszeg脙漏nys脙漏gben 脙漏lnek, illetve id脜聭ben felk脙漏sz脙录ltek az el脜聭tt脙录nk 脙隆ll脙鲁 t脙漏li id脜聭szakra.

Mindennek ellen脙漏re vajon melyik az az uni脙鲁s orsz脙隆g, amely 脙隆llampolg脙隆rainak rekordmagas 脙隆ram脙隆rakkal kell szemben脙漏zni脙录k? Igen, sajnos ez脙潞ttal is Magyarorsz脙隆gr脙鲁l van sz脙鲁. Ugyanis d脙露bbenetes adatok 脙漏rkeztek novemberben: Magyarorsz脙隆gon k脙漏t nap alatt h脙隆romszoros脙隆ra n脜聭tt a villamos energia 脙隆ra, ez pedig eg脙漏sz Eur脙鲁pa legmagasabb 脙隆rait eredm脙漏nyezte.

A dr脙隆mai emelked脙漏s okai t脙露bbr脙漏t脜卤ek, de minden arra vezethet脜聭 vissza, hogy Orb脙隆n Viktor 脙漏s korm脙隆nya sorozatosan hib脙隆s korm脙隆nyzati d脙露nt脙漏seket hoz. Nem fejlesztett脙漏k az infrastrukt脙潞r脙隆t, nem diverzifik脙隆lt脙隆k az energiamixet 脙漏s arra a meglep脜聭 fordulatra sem sz脙隆m脙颅tottak, hogy t脙漏len hideg van.

Felmer脙录l a k脙漏rd脙漏s, hogy vajon direkt csin脙隆lt脙隆k vagy szimpl脙隆n alkalmatlanok. Mindenesetre v脙漏get kell vetni annak, hogy Orb脙隆n Viktor sorozatos hib脙隆s korm脙隆nyzati d脙露nt脙漏seinek k脙露vetkezt脙漏ben a magyar emberek biztons脙隆g 脙漏s kisz脙隆m脙颅that脙鲁s脙隆g helyett Eur脙鲁pa-rekorder 脙隆ram脙隆rakkal n脙漏znek szembe. Szoci脙隆ldemokrata k脙漏pvisel脜聭k脙漏nt az egyik legfontosabb feladatomnak tartom, hogy egyetlen magyar embernek se kelljen azon agg脙鲁dnia, hogy marad-e p脙漏nze 脙漏telre, iskol脙隆ra, gy脙鲁gyszerre miut脙隆n kifizette az Orb脙隆n脙漏k 脙隆ltal rekordmagasra emelt energiasz脙隆ml脙隆t.

脗聽		脗聽

脗聽脗聽Dan-脜聻tefan Motreanu (PPE), 脙庐n scris. 芒聙聯 脙聨n Rom脙垄nia, statul sprijin脛聝 consumatorii casnici 脠聶i 脙庐ntreprinderile prin subven脠聸ionarea pre脠聸urilor la energie, implement脙垄nd m脛聝suri de plafonare 脠聶i scheme de sprijin. Aceste ini脠聸iative sunt esen脠聸iale pentru a proteja popula脠聸ia 脠聶i mediul economic de fluctua脠聸iile pie脠聸ei energetice 脠聶i pentru a asigura accesul echitabil la energie la pre脠聸uri sustenabile. O problem脛聝 major脛聝 care cauzeaz脛聝 aceast脛聝 situa脠聸ie o reprezint脛聝 nivelul precar al interconectivit脛聝脠聸ii energetice 脙庐ntre statele membre. De exemplu, lipsa unei conexiuni de doar 20 de kilometri 脙庐ntre re脠聸elele energetice din Ungaria 脠聶i Austria are un impact negativ direct asupra costurilor ridicate ale energiei electrice din Rom脙垄nia.

脙聨n acest context, consider urgent脛聝 脙庐mbun脛聝t脛聝脠聸irea interconectivit脛聝脠聸ii re脠聸elelor energetice 脙庐n UE. O infrastructur脛聝 integrat脛聝 va permite consumatorilor s脛聝 beneficieze de pre脠聸uri competitive, valorific脙垄nd avantajele pie脠聸ei unice europene. Solicit Comisiei Europene s脛聝 adopte m脛聝suri urgente 脠聶i concrete pentru dezvoltarea 脠聶i extinderea re脠聸elelor transfrontaliere, astfel 脙庐nc脙垄t s脛聝 asigur脛聝m stabilitate, predictibilitate 脠聶i accesibilitate pe termen lung 脙庐n sectorul energetic.

脗聽脗聽Waldemar Tomaszewski (ECR), ra脜隆tu. 芒聙聯 Ponia Pirmininke,脗聽kylan脛聧ios energijos kainos palie脛聧ia daugum脛聟 Europos S脛聟jungos gyventoj脜鲁, ypa脛聧 nauj脜鲁 Vidurio ir Ryt脜鲁 Europos valstybi脜鲁. Tai tiesiogiai prisideda prie energijos nepritekliaus. Remiantis Eurostato duomenimis, daugiau nei 9 procentai, arba 42 mln., valstybi脜鲁 nari脜鲁 gyventoj脜鲁 nesugeb脛聴s i脜隆laikyti tinkamos temperat脜芦ros savo namuose ir butuose. Tai ne脛炉sivaizduojama ir nepriimtina situacija XXI am脜戮iaus Europoje.

Verta priminti, kad Europos S脛聟junga energetin脛炉 nepritekli脜鲁 apibr脛聴脜戮ia kaip situacij脛聟, kai nam脜鲁 脜芦kis negali gauti tinkam脜鲁 energetini脜鲁 paslaug脜鲁, kurios patenkint脜鲁 jo pagrindinius poreikius tokius kaip 脜隆ildymas, v脛聴sinimas, ap脜隆vietimas ir prietais脜鲁 veikimas. Energijos nepriteklius da脜戮nai kyla d脛聴l ma脜戮脜鲁 pajam脜鲁, dideli脜鲁 energijos kain脜鲁 ir 脜戮emo b脜芦sto energijos vartojimo efektyvumo.

Ta脛聧iau did脜戮iausia kalt脛聴 d脛聴l did脛聴jan脛聧io europie脛聧i脜鲁 energetinio nepritekliaus tenka klaidingai ES klimato politikai ir taip vadinamoms ES ATLPS direktyvoms, 脛炉vedan脛聧ioms prekyb脛聟 CO2 emisijos leidimais. D脛聴l to smarkiai i脜隆auga elektros ir degal脜鲁 kainos, o tai tiesiogiai veikia nam脜鲁 脜芦kio i脜隆laidas. Tod脛聴l, galvodama apie ateit脛炉 ir 脜戮moni脜鲁 gerov脛聶, ES tur脛聴t脜鲁 pasitraukti nuo neracionalios ir 脜戮alingos energetikos politikos. Pirmiausia reik脛聴t脜鲁 sustabdyti arba at脜隆aukti prekyb脛聟 CO2 emisijomis - m脜芦s脜鲁 pilie脛聧i脜鲁 labui.

脗聽

13. Recent legislation targeting LGBTQI persons and the need for protecting the rule of law and a discrimination-free Union (debate)
Video of the speeches
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Die Pr脙陇sidentin. 芒聙聯 Als n脙陇chster Punkt der Tagesordnung folgt die Aussprache 脙录ber die Erkl脙陇rung der Kommission zu den j脙录ngsten Rechtsvorschriften, die sich gegen LGBTIQ-Personen richten, und die Notwendigkeit, die Rechtsstaatlichkeit und die Diskriminierungsfreiheit in der Union zu sch脙录tzen [2024/2910(RSP)].

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Helena Dalli, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Madam President, honourable Members, I thank you for the opportunity to address this Chamber on the recent legislation targeting LGBTIQ persons and the need for protecting the rule of law and a discrimination-free Union.

Five years ago, the Commission put equality at the heart of its agenda, striving to build a Union of equality where all people could live safely and free from discrimination. The Commission adopted the first-ever LGBTIQ equality strategy to create the conditions for everyone to live, thrive and lead regardless of their sexual orientation, sex characteristics, gender identity or expression, or any other personal characteristic. The adoption of this strategy was a significant milestone to advance LGBTIQ equality in the EU, as indicated in the report on the implementation of the strategy published in September. This report analyses how the situation of LGBTIQ persons evolved in the EU, what progress has been made and which areas require greater focus to fully implement this strategy by 2025. Twelve Member States adopted dedicated national action plans on LGBTIQ equality, and four more are currently preparing them.

I am happy of the progress made. However, equality for LGBTIQ persons is, regrettably, not yet a reality. As President von der Leyen underlined in her political guidelines, we must continue to do more for everyone to live, thrive and lead regardless of who they are. Data shows that social acceptance of LGBTIQ persons has steadily increased across the EU since the Commission adopted the strategy, and that LGBTIQ persons are more open about themselves in society.

However, according to the 2024 LGBTIQ survey of the EU Agency for Fundamental Rights, there has been a significant increase in hate-motivated harassment targeting LGBTIQ people, with 55脗聽% of respondents experiencing it, an increase of 18脗聽% since 2019. Physical and sexual attacks are reported to particularly affect trans, non-binary, gender-diverse and intersex people. LGBTIQ-phobic hate is aggravated by the rise of anti-gender and anti-LGBTIQ narratives. Most LGBTIQ persons, 63脗聽%, have met with hateful statements online about the LGBTIQ community, most often referencing so-called 'LGBTIQ propaganda' or 'gender ideology'.

We firmly reject those labels. The EU champions full and equal enjoyment of human rights by all. This alarming increase in hate-motivated speech is also reflected in extremist political discourse. For this reason, the Commission proposed in 2021 that the Council adopt a decision to include hate speech and hate crime in the list of EU crimes. Once Member States adopt such a Council decision, the Commission will be able to propose legislation to criminalise hate speech and hate crimes based on other protected characteristics than the ones currently laid down in the framework decision on combating racism and xenophobia, such as sexual orientation or gender.

However, as you know very well, such a Council decision requires unanimity, which has not yet been obtained. The Commission is concerned about any development that could put at risk the effective implementation of EU law, and remains fully committed to addressing inequalities and discrimination affecting LGBTIQ persons.

Let me reassure you that the Commission will use all the instruments at its disposal to protect the EU's core values, including equality and human rights, and will not hesitate to act as necessary as we have done in the past. For instance, in July of 2022, the Commission decided to refer Hungary to the Court of Justice of the EU over a Hungarian law which discriminates against persons based on their sexual orientation and gender identity. The Commission considers that this law violates internal market rules, the fundamental rights of individuals as well as EU values. The case is still pending before the Court of Justice, as you know. A hearing of this case last took place on 19脗聽November this year. Sixteen Member States and Parliament have intervened in the case supporting the position of the Commission.

Finally, let me recall that President von der Leyen proposed in her political guidelines an updated strategy on LGBTIQ equality post-2025. This should notably focus on the continued and persisting hate-motivated harassment and violence, including online, and banning the practice of conversion practices.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Ana Catarina Mendes, em nome do Grupo S&D. 芒聙聯 Senhora Presidente, Caros Colegas, o que 脙漏 inacredit脙隆vel 脙漏, no s脙漏culo XXI, estarmos a ter um debate desta natureza. E s脙鲁 temos o debate sobre as discrimina脙搂脙碌es no s脙漏culo XXI porque, verdadeiramente, por mais que haja planos de a脙搂脙拢o - e Portugal 脙漏 um dos Estados-Membros que t脙陋m os planos de a脙搂脙拢o em vigor - a verdade 脙漏 que Estados como a Hungria, a Bulg脙隆ria ou a It脙隆lia violam todos os dias os direitos da comunidade LGBTQI.

E 脙漏 por isso, caros colegas, que estamos aqui hoje confrontados com mais uns quantos discursos. Mas, mais do que os discursos, o que n脙鲁s precisamos mesmo 脙漏 de saber: quando os Estados n脙拢o aplicam os planos de a脙搂脙拢o, quando os Estados violam sistematicamente os direitos humanos, quando todos os dias os governos fazem de conta que n脙拢o ouvem a voz deste Parlamento na defesa dos direitos humanos, se continuaremos a fazer proclama脙搂脙碌es ou se devemos verdadeiramente atuar. E 脙漏 por isso que 脙漏 muito importante que o pr脙鲁ximo Conselho possa retomar as negocia脙搂脙碌es da diretiva de 2008 antidiscrimina脙搂脙拢o que se encontra desbloqueada. Pelo respeito pelos direitos humanos.

脗聽脗聽Andr脙隆s L脙隆szl脙鲁, a PfE k脙漏pvisel脜聭csoport nev脙漏ben. 芒聙聯 Tisztelt Eln脙露k Asszony! A gyermek nem egy term脙漏k. Az anyas脙隆g nem egy szolg脙隆ltat脙隆s. A nem脙录nket nem tudjuk megv脙隆ltoztatni, a szexu脙隆lis propagand脙隆nak pedig nincs helye az iskol脙隆kban. A n脜聭ellenes 脙漏s csal脙隆dellenes baloldali propaganda m脙露g脙露tt nincs sz脙漏les t脙隆rsadalmi t脙隆mogatotts脙隆g, ez脙漏rt az Eur脙鲁pai Bizotts脙隆g 脙漏s a baloldal b脙颅r脙鲁s脙隆gi d脙露nt脙漏sekkel pr脙鲁b脙隆lja r脙隆k脙漏nyszer脙颅teni akarat脙隆t a tag脙隆llamokra. Nem fogjuk hagyni.

Minden t脙隆rsadalom, minden nemzet alapvet脜聭 egys脙漏ge a csal脙隆d. 脙聣pp ez脙漏rt nagyon helyesen a csal脙隆dpolitika, a t脙隆rsadalompolitikai k脙漏rd脙漏sek, a gyermekv脙漏delem 脙漏s az oktat脙隆spolitika is nemzeti hat脙隆sk脙露rbe tartoznak, nem uni脙鲁sba. Magyarorsz脙隆gon olyan t脙露rv脙漏nyek szab脙隆lyozz脙隆k az anyas脙隆got 脙漏s a csal脙隆dokat, amelyek nagy t脙隆rsadalmi t脙隆mogatotts脙隆ggal b脙颅rnak. A gyermekv脙漏delmi int脙漏zked脙漏seinket n脙漏pszavaz脙隆son a magyar emberek egy脙露ntet脜卤 t脙露bbs脙漏ge t脙隆mogatta. 脙聹zenet脙录k vil脙隆gos. El a kezekkel a gyerekeinkt脜聭l!

脗聽脗聽Paolo Inselvini, a nome del gruppo ECR. 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, milioni di europei discriminati, strumentalizzati, esclusi. 脙聢 vero: accade ogni giorno e ad essere vittima di tutto questo sono giovani, famiglie, associazioni che sono attaccati per il semplice motivo di voler difendere la famiglia, di affermare che si nasce maschi o femmine, di contrastare la folle ideologia gender.

In Europa non ci sono leggi che discriminano le persone per il loro orientamento sessuale ma c'脙篓 chi, anche in quest'Aula, anche oggi, non vorrebbe permettere a persone come me di esprimere le proprie idee o la propria fede.

Al contrario, grazie al governo Meloni, l'utero in affitto, la barbara pratica che permette di sfruttare le donne e di compravendere i bambini, 脙篓 stata resa reato universale in Italia. Questo per脙虏 non basta. Dobbiamo rendere l'utero in affitto reato universale in tutta Europa, proteggere donne e bambini e tutti quei ragazzi che l'ideologia LGBT confonde e strumentalizza.

In un'Unione europea che ha perso il coraggio di dire la verit脙聽, dobbiamo semplicemente tornare ad accettarla con umilt脙聽. Non possiamo sostituirci n脙漏 a Dio n脙漏 alla natura: dobbiamo ascoltare il grido di milioni di persone e di europei che sono stanchi delle menzogne e vogliono soltanto un futuro libero per i propri figli.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Abir Al-Sahlani, f脙露r Renew gruppen. 芒聙聯 Fru talman! Jag m脙楼ste f脙楼 s脙陇ga att jag blir f脙露rundrad 脙露ver den m脙陇ngd "hittep脙楼"-lagar som Viktor Orb脙隆n o. co. kan hitta p脙楼 f脙露r att diskriminera hbtqi-personer och deras r脙陇ttigheter.

F脙露rst f脙露dde inte kvinnorna tillr脙陇ckligt med barn. Ja, vad 脙陇r svaret d脙楼? Jo, att begr脙陇nsa regnb脙楼gsfamiljer. Sedan var det onaturligt, omoraliskt, rent av opatriotiskt att 脙陇lska n脙楼gon av samma k脙露n. Och vad 脙陇r svaret? Jo, att diskriminera hbtqi-personer.脗聽Och nu det sista: Vi ska skydda barnen. Och vad 脙陇r svaret? Ding, ding, ding, ding 芒聙聯 att ta bort alla hbtqi-uttryck ur det offentliga rummet.

Vad 脙陇r det egentligen, den h脙陇r fixeringen vid just den h脙陇r gruppen av m脙陇nniskor? F脙露rst anv脙陇nds ord som att v脙陇rna, skydda, f脙露rsvara 芒聙聯 alla positiva ord. Men allt kokar egentligen ner till att diskriminera m脙陇nniskor som tillh脙露r hbtqi-"communityt" 芒聙聯 n脙楼gonting som hela EU st脙楼r upp emot, enade. Nej till diskriminering, har vi sagt om och om och om igen. D脙陇rf脙露r m脙楼ste denna st脙陇ndiga nedgradering av m脙陇nskliga r脙陇ttigheter och friheter f脙露r hbtqi-personer i Ungern stoppas, och det nu. Viktor Orb脙隆n o. co. m脙楼ste st脙陇llas till svars.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Kim Van Sparrentak, on behalf of the Verts/ALE Group. 芒聙聯 Madam President, dear Colleagues, I want to protect children.

Unfortunately, we see a trend in Europe where politicians undermine the rule of law, take away basic human rights, and then use the LGBTQ+ community as a diversion tactic: they spread hate about us to disguise corruption, to hide their silencing of civil society or simply just hoping to win elections.

But censoring knowledge on gender identity and sex characteristics 芒聙聯 basic scientific facts 芒聙聯 in and around schools does not protect kids: which intersex kid benefits from not learning that intersex people exist? Which kid is protected by depriving them of their basic right to health care, such as gender-affirming care, when they struggle with gender dysphoria? And how do we protect the mental health of kids who think there is something wrong with them without knowing that yes, queer couples exist?

The best Europe for kids to grow up in is a Europe where, when you wonder why you feel that your assigned gender doesn't suit you, or when you doubt what is going on when you suddenly feel butterflies for your best friend, you have access to information and the ability to meet peers. It fosters an environment where parents don't have to be in lawsuits against their government to ensure they still have legal rights over their children.

It is a Europe where all children can be themselves and feel loved.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Estrella Gal脙隆n, en nombre del Grupo The Left. 芒聙聯 Se脙卤ora presidenta, las fuerzas reaccionarias en Europa no tienen m脙隆s proyecto que el odio. Odian a las personas migrantes, odian a las mujeres libres y empoderadas y odian a las personas del colectivo LGTBIQ+, porque cuando les odian a ellos, odian a nuestros amigos y odian a nuestras hermanas y amigas lesbianas, y tambi脙漏n a nuestros hijos y nuestras hijas trans. Porque cuando les odian a ellos y a ellas, tambi脙漏n nos odian a nosotras.

All脙颅 donde pueden, censuran la cultura y atacan las libertades y los derechos de quienes somos, sentimos o pensamos diferentes. Es necesario que condicionemos los fondos al respeto de los derechos de todas las personas, porque somos parte de esta sociedad.

La Uni脙鲁n Europea de los derechos y las libertades no puede quedarse en un mero eslogan. A la ultraderecha se la combate ampliando derechos 芒聙聰como hemos hecho ya en Espa脙卤a芒聙聰 con una nueva norma para la igualdad y no discriminaci脙鲁n de las personas LGTBI en las empresas.

Europa no puede ser c脙鲁mplice. Ellos quieren zonas libres de personas LGTBI y nosotras queremos una Europa libre de odio y de homofobia.

脗聽脗聽Zsuzsanna Borvend脙漏g, a ESN k脙漏pvisel脜聭csoport nev脙漏ben. 芒聙聯 Tisztelt Eln脙露k Asszony! 脙聳n脙露k ford脙颅tva 脙录lnek a lovon, amikor az LMBTQ-embereknek t脙露bbletjogokat k脙露vetelnek, egy t脙露rpe kisebbs脙漏g nev脙漏ben terroriz脙隆lj脙隆k a t脙露bbs脙漏gi t脙隆rsadalmakat. A gyermeknek joga van a sz脙录leihez, joga van a gondtalan gyermekkorhoz, az eg脙漏szs脙漏ges fejl脜聭d脙漏shez, a sz脙录let脙漏skori nem脙漏nek tiszteletben tart脙隆s脙隆hoz. Mi megv脙漏dj脙录k 脜聭ket 脙聳n脙露kt脜聭l 脙漏s a p脙漏nz- 脙漏s a celebvil脙隆gban m脜卤k脙露d脜聭 pedofilh脙隆l脙鲁zatokt脙鲁l, ahogy a genderlobbi 脙隆ltal befoly脙隆solt gyermekj脙鲁l脙漏ti int脙漏zm脙漏nyekkel szemben is, amelyek sokszor indokolatlanul szak脙颅tj脙隆k el a gyermekeket a sz脙录leikt脜聭l. 脙聳n脙露k b脙录ntetik azokat a tag脙隆llamokat, ahol t脙露rv脙漏nyekkel v脙漏dik a gyermekek jogait. 脙聣n viszont azt k脙漏rem t脜聭l脙录k, 脙漏s a magyar korm脙隆nyt脙鲁l is, hogy szigor脙颅ts脙隆k e t脙露rv脙漏nyeket 脙漏s s脙潞jts脙隆k elrettent脜聭 b脙录ntet脙漏ssel a gyermekeink megront脙鲁it.

脗聽脗聽Micha脜聜 Szczerba (PPE). 芒聙聯 Szanowna Pani Przewodnicz脛聟ca, Pani Komisarz, Kole脜录anki i Koledzy! Marian Turski w 2020 r., podczas 75. rocznicy wyzwolenia muzeum Auschwitz-Birkenau m脙鲁wi脜聜: 芒聙聻Nigdy nie b脛聟d脜潞cie oboj脛聶tni, kiedy jakakolwiek mniejszo脜聸脛聡 jest dyskryminowana芒聙聺. I mam wra脜录enie, 脜录e te s脜聜owa r脙鲁wnie脜录 kierowa脜聜 do przedstawicieli na tej sali niekt脙鲁rych 脜聸rodowisk politycznych.

Szanowni Pa脜聞stwo, z niepokojem przyjmuj脛聶 informacj脛聶 o zmianach legislacyjnych zachodz脛聟cych w Bu脜聜garii czy na W脛聶grzech. Populi脜聸ci, nacjonali脜聸ci i ludzie z脜聜ej woli wykorzystuj脛聟 szczucie na osoby nieheteronormatywne i uprzedmiotawiaj脛聟 mniejszo脜聸ci do cel脙鲁w politycznych. Naszym zadaniem, zadaniem Komisji i tej, i przysz脜聜ej jest r脙鲁wnie脜录 sta脛聡 na stra脜录y godno脜聸ci cz脜聜owieka, na stra脜录y praw cz脜聜owieka. Chc脛聶 bardzo wyra脜潞nie powiedzie脛聡: Takie dzia脜聜ania naruszaj脛聟 zobowi脛聟zania wynikaj脛聟ce z Karty Praw Podstawowych Unii Europejskiej i Traktat脙鲁w. I atak na jedn脛聟 grup脛聶 to otwarcie drzwi dla dalszych narusze脜聞 wobec innych grup. Brak reakcji na poziomie unijnym to ryzyko ustanowienia niebezpiecznego precedensu.

Chcia脜聜bym powiedzie脛聡 o Polsce, o moim kraju. Przez 8 lat sytuacja os脙鲁b nieheteronormatywnych by脜聜a dramatyczna. Rz脛聟d u脜录ywa脜聜 szczucia na te osoby, traktuj脛聟c to jako polityk脛聶, jako polityk脛聶 rz脛聟du, poprzez nienawi脜聸脛聡 i podzia脜聜. Chc脛聶 bardzo wyra脜潞nie powiedzie脛聡, 脜录e s脛聟 dobre zmiany, o kt脙鲁rych chc脛聶 m脙鲁wi脛聡. Wczoraj Rada Ministr脙鲁w premiera Donalda Tuska przyj脛聶脜聜a zapisy, 脜录e mowa nienawi脜聸ci wobec os脙鲁b ze wzgl脛聶du na orientacj脛聶 seksualn脛聟 czy to脜录samo脜聸脛聡 p脜聜ciow脛聟 b脛聶dzie 脜聸cigana z urz脛聶du. 脗聽脗聽Birgit Sippel (S&D). 芒聙聯 Frau Pr脙陇sidentin, Kolleginnen und Kollegen! Niemand verliebt sich nur so zum Spa脙聼 in das angeblich falsche Geschlecht und riskiert Diskriminierung und Gewalt. Kein Neugeborenes kommt willentlich mit intergeschlechtlichen Merkmalen zur Welt. Keines dieser Kinder ist krank oder braucht eine Therapie.

Artikel脗聽21 unserer Charta ist ganz klar: Diskriminierungen wegen des Geschlechts oder der sexuellen Ausrichtung sind verboten 芒聙聯 und dennoch: Verbote der Darstellung vermeintlich falscher Beziehungsformen oder Geschlechtsidentit脙陇ten in Ungarn, Litauen, Bulgarien, Hasspolitik in Italien; EU芒聙聭weit immer mehr, immer gewaltt脙陇tigere Angriffe auf LGBTIQ+芒聙聭Menschen, immer mehr Hass und Hetze im Netz, insbesondere auf X.

Die neue EU芒聙聭Kommission muss jetzt Position beziehen zum Schutz von LGBTIQ+芒聙聭Menschen, und der Rat muss endlich die Antidiskriminierungsrichtlinie annehmen sowie Hassrede und Gewalt in die Liste der EU芒聙聭Straftaten aufnehmen.

脗聽脗聽Maciej W脛聟sik (ECR). 芒聙聯 Pani Przewodnicz脛聟ca! Szanowni Pa脜聞stwo! W Polsce osoby o odmiennej orientacji seksualnej nie s脛聟 dyskryminowane. Polacy s脛聟 spo脜聜ecze脜聞stwem tolerancyjnym. W polskiej konstytucji jest powszechnie szanowany zapis o prawnej ochronie 脜录ycia prywatnego, rodzinnego oraz osobistego. Ale w Polsce tak脜录e rodzice maj脛聟 prawo do wychowywania dzieci zgodnie z w脜聜asnymi przekonaniami, wychowania i nauczania zgodnego ze swoimi pogl脛聟dami. I to prawo jest dzi脜聸 w Polsce gwa脜聜cone.

Do programu nauczania rz脛聟d Tuska zamiast nieobowi脛聟zkowego wychowania do 脜录ycia w rodzinie wprowadza nowy, obowi脛聟zkowy od czwartej klasy szko脜聜y podstawowej przedmiot, kt脙鲁ry zak脜聜ada mi脛聶dzy innymi afirmacj脛聶 dzia脜聜a脜聞 autoseksualnych i orientacj脛聶 LGBT. Niech ka脜录dy decyduje o swoim 脜录yciu prywatnym, ale nie mo脜录na odbiera脛聡 rodzicom prawa do wychowywania dzieci zgodnie z ich warto脜聸ciami. Odbieranie rodzicom prawa do decydowania 芒聙聯 to jest w脜聜a脜聸nie dyskryminacja. Narzucanie dzieciom seksualizacji wbrew rodzicom 芒聙聯 to jest dyskryminacja. Dlatego w Polsce spo脜聜ecze脜聞stwo protestuje dzisiaj przeciwko tym projektom. Komfort mniejszo脜聸ci nie mo脜录e zdominowa脛聡 praw wi脛聶kszo脜聸ci. Chro脜聞my dzieci.

(M脙鲁wca zgodzi脜聜 si脛聶 na pytanie zasygnalizowane przez podniesienie niebieskiej kartki)

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Raquel Garc脙颅a Hermida-Van Der Walle (Renew), blue-card question. 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, thank you, colleague W脛聟sik for accepting my blue card and my question.

You spoke about the right of parents to bring up their children according to their convictions.

Do you think that parents also have the right to inflict enormous pain on their children when they subject them to conversion therapy?

脗聽脗聽

脗聽脗聽Maciej W脛聟sik (ECR), odpowied脜潞 na pytanie zadane przez podniesienie niebieskiej kartki. 芒聙聯 Szanowna Pani, ja sam jestem ojcem i mam dzieci. I doskonale wiem, co jest dla moich dzieci najlepsze, bo je kocham, i wiem, 脜录e wi脛聶kszo脜聸脛聡, ogromna wi脛聶kszo脜聸脛聡 rodzic脙鲁w dzia脜聜a dla dobra dzieci. W odr脙鲁脜录nieniu od r脙鲁脜录nych dziwnych edukator脙鲁w promuj脛聟cych r脙鲁脜录nego typu ideologie, kt脙鲁re s脛聟 szkodliwe i s脛聟 przyczyn脛聟 chocia脜录by wielu p脙鲁脜潞niejszych tragedii i samob脙鲁jstw.
